caption: A video captures a man with blonde hair wearing a dark blue t-shirt reacting to a screen. He is positioned in the lower left of the interface, situated in a room with a decorated Christmas tree and a wall featuring a framed "20" jersey. The screen displays a purple-themed digital sports card interface for a player named "TROY POLAMALU" with a rating of "95" and a position of "SS". Text on the screen reads "Team Chemistry And Ability Slot" with a checkbox and "REFUND: 5". Another section notes "Add Training to unlock the Team Chemistry and Ability Slots" and "NO ATTRIBUTE BOOSTS". Across the sequence, the man’s expression shifts from a wide-mouthed, excited shout to a joyful smile. The interface elements shift slightly in perspective and framing, cropping different portions of the purple background and the player card as the view alternates.
